steps.title: Compare the walnut bars
steps.content: The student needs the season in which walnuts reached their lowest price. That requires comparing the walnut data across the four seasons shown in the graph.

steps.title: Eliminate higher seasons
steps.content:
• Choice A is not the season with the lowest walnut price.
  • Choice B is not the season with the lowest walnut price.
  • Choice D is not the season with the lowest walnut price.

steps.title: Select the lowest season
steps.content: The graph shows walnuts reaching their lowest price in the 2018/19 season. The answer is C.
